title: Quadra Isles
description: a completely overhauled world focused on exploration, combat, and building while with your friends.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e46700ae0db8cae83e2a098ed639fbfaffbe10cb_0.webp)
# Quadra Isles

a completely overhauled world focused on exploration, combat, and building, optimized for you and your friends!

overhauled and HUGE worldgen and structures across all dimensions. origins, better combat, tougher mobs, more loot, and a ton of building and decoration options. all with proximity voice chat and full performance optimization so it actually runs well for you and your friends.

official discord: https://discord.gg/axwmQX2s4S
